title: iris chamaeiris subsp. italica
intro: Iris chamaeiris subsp. italica, also known as the Italian iris, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the iris family (Iridaceae). The medicinal properties of Iris chamaeiris subsp. italica are primarily attributed to its root, which contains iridin, a glycoside that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Iris chamaeiris subsp. italica, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used to treat these conditions, and it is also used in some folk remedies for treating fever and rheumatism.
